what_it_solves: Restores attribution signal lost to ATT/cookie loss. Doubled EMQ = 5% CPA reduction (28k campaigns meta-analysis). EMQ 5→7 unlocks +33% incremental purchases (global CL meta-analysis, stat-reviewed).
activate_it: Events Manager → Data Sources → check EMQ score per event
Add missing customer parameters: email, phone, name, IP, user agent (hashed)
Use Signals Explorer to identify coverage gaps
Push EMQ to 8+ (sweet spot for attribution recovery)

what_it_solves: ML-optimized delivery across surfaces. Beats manual placement in 80%+ of A/B tests. Median 5% lower CPA vs BAU placement strategy (global meta-analysis, 99.91% confidence).
activate_it: Ads Manager → Ad set → Placements → select 'Advantage+ placements'
ML auto-allocates spend across Feed, Stories, Reels, Marketplace, Audience Network
Beats manual placement in 80%+ of A/B tests
Avoid manual placement unless brand-safety constraint

what_it_solves: Filters spam leads at the bidding layer. Conversion Lead + CAPI CRM = 13% lower CPQL vs standard Lead optimization (NORAM meta-analysis, 98% confidence). Lead volume ↓ but CRM acceptance ↑ significantly.
activate_it: Ads Manager → Lead Gen campaign → Performance goal → 'Maximize conversion leads'
Connect CRM via CAPI to feed back qualified-lead signal
Filters spam/low-intent at bidding layer
Expect lead volume ↓ but CRM acceptance ↑ significantly

what_it_solves: Pre-fill + verify reduces spam. SMS phone verification filters junk leads with invalid contact info. Format validation improves CRM acceptance rate. Qualitative quality gain — no hard CPA stat yet.
activate_it: Ads Manager → Lead form → enable 'Verify lead info' (email + phone validation)
Pre-fill with Meta profile, validate format before submission
Reduces spam/typo leads, improves CRM acceptance rate

what_it_solves: More events fired = more learning data for ML. CAPI implementation = 14.6% more signal vs Pixel-only, 12.7% lower estimated cost per purchase (MarSci EMEA study).
activate_it: Events Manager → Data Sources → audit event firing rate vs Pixel baseline
Add CAPI-only events for offline / phone conversions
Confirm dedup_key set correctly between Pixel + CAPI
More events fired = more ML learning signal

what_it_solves: Budget consolidation. Advantage+ App Campaigns = 6-10% lower CPA depending on optimization goal (global meta-analysis). Exits learning phase 30-40% faster than ABO.
activate_it: Ads Manager → Campaign level → toggle 'Advantage+ campaign budget' (CBO)
Consolidate 3+ ad sets under one campaign budget
System reallocates spend to top-performing ad set automatically
Exits learning phase 30-40% faster than ABO

what_it_solves: Creator/UGC signal at scale. BAU + Partnership Ads = 19% lower median Cost Per Incremental Action, 95% confidence (meta-analysis of 47 CL studies, Jan-Dec 2025).
activate_it: Identify creator/UGC partners aligned with brand (use Brand Collabs Manager)
Set up Partnership Ads in existing campaigns (Ads Manager → Ad level → Partnership Ad toggle)
Test 3-5 creator concepts in same ad set as BAU creative
Enable Dynamic Header Optimization for creative variation
Compare CTR + CPA vs standard ads → scale winners 20%+
expected_lift: +25% CTR, -19% lower cost per incremental action

what_it_solves: Reels Performant Creative = 7% lower CPA (global meta-analysis, Oct 2025). Reels ads 3-4× more efficient on impression delivery ratio. 3.2× more effective for brand impressions.
activate_it: Ads Manager → Ad set → Placements → ensure Reels (Facebook + Instagram) ON
Upload 9:16 vertical video — minimum 1 per ad set
Add audio track (silent video severely penalized in Reels feed)
Use GenAI Video Expansion to auto-extend 16:9 → 9:16 if asset library limited
Track Reels-specific CPM vs Feed CPM (typically -20% on Reels)

what_it_solves: Adding video to image-only ad sets = 13% lower CPA + 11% higher ROAS (validated by CL, MICAS study). Diversified creatives in ASC = +14% purchases (Osprey case study).
activate_it: Audit current creative split — flag if 1 creative >40% spend
Brief 3-5 distinct creative concepts per ad set (variant ≠ minor edit)
Mix formats: video + static + carousel within same ad set
Use Advantage+ Creative to auto-generate format variants
Refresh cadence: ≥1 new concept per 2 weeks per ad set

what_it_solves: Connects CRM to Meta signal layer. Same CL proof as lead-quality bidding: Conversion Lead + CAPI CRM = 13% lower CPQL. Critical for B2B long-cycle where offline conversions re-attribute revenue to Meta.
activate_it: Events Manager → Connect CRM (Salesforce / HubSpot / Zoho native connector)
Push offline lead → MQL → SQL → Won events back to Meta
Re-attributes B2B funnel — closes loop between ad click and revenue
Critical for long-cycle B2B campaigns

solution: Drive website traffic with website to WhatsApp ads
what_it_solves: Ads clicking to WhatsApp optimizing for leads = 24% lower CPL vs conversation-optimized (global launch data). Enables direct merchant conversations at lower funnel cost.
activate_it: Enable WhatsApp overlay for website campaigns

what_it_solves: Counts only conversions Meta drove. Cleaner ROAS reads.
activate_it: Ads Manager → Account Settings → Attribution Setting → enable Incremental Attribution
Confirm with analytics team to avoid double-counting in BI dashboards
Add 'Incremental Conversions' column in reporting view
Re-baseline ROAS reads after 14d to capture cleaner attribution

solution: Chat with leads from instant form (Messenger)
what_it_solves: B2P Messenger defaulting on form = 10% increase in new form adoption, 77% acceptance rate. Continues conversation post-form = warmer lead handoff to sales.
activate_it: Lead Ads → enable 'Continue conversation on Messenger' post-submit
Configure auto-reply + handoff to live agent or chatbot
Higher SQL conversion vs cold email follow-up

what_it_solves: Closes the loop between Meta delivery and your BI.
activate_it: Events Manager → Integrations → connect Google Analytics 4 / Adobe Analytics
Maps full-funnel events (sessions, scroll depth, on-page actions) into Meta signal
Improves Meta ML targeting + attribution loop

what_it_solves: Causal measurement, not correlation. Defends spend.
activate_it: Open Ads Manager → Experiments → Conversion Lift
Define one test cell on top-spending campaign (min. $10k spend, 7-day window)
Configure conversion event + holdout group (Meta team can run setup for you)
Review lift report at end of test → use to defend run-rate vs CFO

what_it_solves: Optimizes for value, not just conversions. Lifts ROAS.
activate_it: Ads Manager → Campaign → Objective: Sales (or Web Conversions)
Ad set → Performance goal → 'Maximize value of conversions'
Ensure value parameter on Purchase Pixel/CAPI events (USD or local)
Optionally set min ROAS bid floor (start conservative)
Monitor 7d learning phase, expect CPA ↑ but value ↑ more

what_it_solves: Lets system mix-and-match assets for best per-placement combo.
activate_it: Ads Manager → Ad level → toggle 'Flexible media'
Add 5-10 assets per ad set — system mixes per placement automatically
Confirm brand-safety guardrails on auto-mixed combos
Compare CPA vs locked-creative ads in same campaign

what_it_solves: Same logic, account-wide. Compounding gains.
activate_it: Account-level audit: count of campaigns, ad sets, ads vs spend tier
Rule of thumb: <50 active ad sets per account for accounts <$1M/mo
Consolidate per objective/funnel stage, not per micro-targeting
Re-baseline after restructure (expect 5-10% CPA improvement)

what_it_solves: Activates WA channel for users on Messenger/Insta.
activate_it: WA Manager → Authentication template → enable cross-channel send
Activates WhatsApp authentication for users converted via Messenger/Insta
Lower-funnel retention play, multiplier on H2 messaging volume

solution: Adopt marketing messages on the MM API for WhatsApp
activate_it: Adopt marketing messages on the MM API for WhatsApp

solution: Pitch Cost Cap for higher spend from Bid Cap constraints
activate_it: Switch to cost per result goal bidding from bid cap

solution: Improve CPA and ROAS by increasing catalog match rate
activate_it: Improve Catalog Match Rate

what_it_solves: Lower CPL than off-platform forms. Better mobile UX.
activate_it: Ads Manager → Campaign objective: Leads (instant form)
Auto-fill form with Meta profile data (lower friction vs external form)
Use rich-context form to pre-qualify
Sync leads to CRM via Lead Ads CRM integration

solution: Adopt Website and Instant Form multiple conversion location
activate_it: Adopt Website and Instant Form multiple conversion location
Adopt Conversions API

what_it_solves: Higher CTR + completion vs static. Low-effort production lift.
activate_it: Ads Manager → Ad level → Advantage+ Creative → enable 'Add motion to images'
Test on 50%+ of static-only ad sets first
Monitor CTR delta vs static-only baseline at day 7
Roll out animated variants where CTR lift ≥+5%

what_it_solves: ML reformats creative across placements automatically. Saves prod cycles.
activate_it: Ads Manager → Ad creation → enable 'Format automation' (Advantage+ Creative)
Upload core asset set (1 video + 3 statics min) — system auto-reformats per placement
Saves manual reformat cycles for Reels, Stories, Feed, Marketplace
Validate per-placement preview before publish

solution: Pitch leads objective with instant form to website form advertisers
activate_it: Pitch leads objective with instant form to website form advertisers

what_it_solves: Surfaces SKUs directly. Better PDP discovery.
activate_it: Ads Manager → Catalog → enable 'Product Extensions' on existing campaigns
Surfaces 3-5 SKUs from catalog directly in ad creative
Better PDP discovery, higher click-to-purchase rate on commerce surfaces
Utility messages upsell
Upsell MM API for WhatsApp
Cross -sell authentication messages
Upsell authentication messages

solution: OS: Consider landing page views optimization
activate_it: Consider landing page views optimization

what_it_solves: Aligns delivery to business KPI vs proxy metric.
activate_it: Ads Manager → Ad set → Bid strategy → switch to 'Goal-based' (Cost cap / Bid cap / ROAS)
Align bid to business KPI vs proxy
Allow 7d for learning phase re-stabilization

what_it_solves: Surface high-affinity variants to keep refresh cadence up.
activate_it: Ads Manager → Creative library → review 'Related media' panel for each top-performing ad
Add 2-3 system-suggested variants per ad set per refresh cycle
Keeps refresh cadence up without full new brief

what_it_solves: Net-new inventory. Early-mover advantage on rising surface.
activate_it: Ads Manager → Ad set → Placements → enable Threads Feed (default-on after May 2025)
If manually excluded, re-enable at ad set level
Net-new inventory — incremental reach on early adopter surface
Asset format: 9:16 or 1:1 recommended

solution: Marketing Messages on WhatsApp on Ads Manager-Crosssell
activate_it: Marketing Messages on WhatsApp on Ads Manager-Upsell
Marketing Messages on WhatsApp on Ads Manager-Crosssell
Unlock Advantage+ Catalog Ads

what_it_solves: Broad targeting + ML signal. Outperforms most manual interest lists.
activate_it: Ads Manager → Ad set → Audience → enable 'Advantage+ audience' (broad + ML signal)
Optionally provide audience suggestion as bias signal (not hard constraint)
Avoid layering multiple manual interest stacks — kills ML effectiveness
Compare CPA vs locked interest audience after 14d
